title: Credit made simple: Credit Cards for Newcomers | TD Canada Trust
meta_description: Learn about our special TD Credit Card offers for newcomers and how using a credit card can help you build your credit in Canada.

How to build and manage your credit score
cards.description: The key to building good credit is to use your credit card responsibly. That means making Purchases with your card and consistently paying the balance off in full and by the due date on your statement
